column2: Inspector Initiates Safe Shutdown of Off-Nominal RPAS
column3: ['Assume the role of CAA flight-ops inspector. ', 'Verify the RPAS is in an off-nominal state. ', 'Initiate independent termination of the RPAS and verify safe shutdown. ']
column4: ['Confirm that I am acting as a CAA flight-ops inspector. ', 'Observe and confirm that the RPAS is exhibiting signs of being in an off-nominal state. ', 'Successfully initiate independent termination of the RPAS, and observe it safely shutting down without any malfunctions or hazards. ']
